overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player moves from a covered sidewalk past construction barriers, through a plaza with graffiti-covered buildings, across wet streets under an elevated highway, and finally along downtown sidewalks surrounded by towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards. The atmosphere is dense with fog, reflecting the colorful neon advertisements and streetlights off the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with construction barriers and neon storefronts

events.description: pedestrian with glowing yellow umbrella passes by closely on the left
slight turn to avoid construction barrier while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, observing neon signs and approaching pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing yellow umbrella walking toward the camera
pedestrian with red umbrella walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers lining the left side of the walkway
bright pink neon sign with CYBER text illuminated against the fog
illuminated MARKET sign on building facade
tall street lamp casting bright light through the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow covered sidewalk flanked by red and white construction barriers on the left and buildings with bright neon signs on the right. The foggy night atmosphere is pierced by streetlamps and pink neon advertisements reflecting off the wet pavement. The player passes pedestrians with glowing umbrellas while walking toward an opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with benches and graffiti-covered building

events.description: turning left from covered sidewalk into open plaza area with benches
passing seated pedestrians on concrete benches near the graffiti wall

agents.ego_description: turning left into the plaza area, navigating around benches and observing the graffiti-covered building

notable_agents.action: seated on concrete bench wearing a red cap and dark clothing
walking with a glowing green umbrella across the plaza

entered.detail: white concrete benches with people sitting and resting
low building facade covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall palm trees in concrete planters
large digital billboard displaying Arasaka corporation advertisement above the building

segments.scene_description: The player turns left into an open plaza featuring white concrete benches where pedestrians sit beneath palm trees. A low building covered in vibrant graffiti dominates the center, topped by a large Arasaka billboard. The atmosphere shifts from the enclosed sidewalk to a more open urban space with mixed lighting from streetlamps and building windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street under elevated highway

events.description: exiting plaza and descending to street level near the road
cars with headlights on pass by on the wet road through the fog
passing under the massive concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the street edge and crossing under the overpass, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: car with bright headlights driving through the foggy street
pedestrian walking along the opposite sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with red structural supports spanning the street
metal railings with red accents along the sidewalk edge
traffic signals suspended over the intersection showing red lights

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the plaza to street level, walking alongside a multi-lane road beneath a massive elevated highway with distinctive red supports. Cars with piercing headlights navigate through the dense fog. The environment opens up to reveal the full scale of the cyberpunk infrastructure, with traffic lights and metal barriers guiding the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and billboards above
passing a newspaper stand and looking up at building number 10

agents.ego_description: walking along the downtown sidewalk while frequently looking up at the massive buildings and digital displays overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking away from the camera

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard with BIG text illuminated in white
red illuminated Ferrari brand sign on building facade
tall skyscraper with large illuminated number 10 on the side
large industrial construction crane structure visible between buildings
metal rack structure holding newspapers and magazines

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves along a downtown sidewalk surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards including a prominent BIG sign and Ferrari advertisement. The player looks up in awe at building number 10 and a large construction crane silhouetted against the foggy night sky. The dense urban canyon creates a breathtaking vertical landscape of neon and steel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a cramped, neon-lit sidewalk into the overwhelming verticality of a cyberpunk downtown core. It begins on a narrow covered walkway flanked by construction barriers and pink neon signs, moving past pedestrians with glowing umbrellas through a dense, foggy night. As the path opens, the camera turns left into a wide plaza featuring palm trees and a graffiti-covered building topped by a massive Arasaka billboard. The scene then shifts to street level, gliding beneath the red supports of a towering elevated highway where car headlights pierce through the mist. Finally, the movement leads into a deep urban canyon of skyscrapers, where the perspective tilts upward to reveal colossal digital advertisements and a construction crane silhouetted against the glowing sky.
